mnemonics: Main is the starting point of any C++ program
keyPoints: The general form of a C++ program includes the following steps:
1. #include directives to include necessary libraries and headers
2. Preprocessor directives to define constants and macros
3. main function where the program starts execution
5. Control structures (if, else if, switch) and loops (for, while, do-while)
7. Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts (classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism)
